_note: HDB carpark codes in the Central Area pricing tier ($1.20 / 30min EPS, $20 day cap).
_source: v1 hand-audit, derived from the migration's prefix heuristic minus its false positives. SK*, TPM2..TPMU, TP10..TP18, SE21/22, MP14 were Sengkang/Toa Payoh/Serangoon/Marine Parade — not Central. The remaining 15 are CBD-cluster (Bras Basah / Chinatown / Tanjong Pagar / Selegie / Albert / Waterloo / Cheng Yan / Buffalo / Hong Lim / Kreta Ayer / Upper Cross).
_todo: Audit against HDB's authoritative Short Term Parking Charges page (https://www.hdb.gov.sg/car-parks/short-term-parking/short-term-parking-charges/). Likely missing: Outram, Tanjong Pagar Plaza, Cantonment, Bukit Ho Swee, parts of Tiong Bahru. Adding codes here is enough — the migration will pick them up on next run.
